media_policy.reason: Source videos remain outside git. Frozen measurements, provenance, and downscaled analysis thumbnails are committed.
media_policy.derived_frames_reason: Downscaled JPEG analysis thumbnails (height <=360px) are committed so visual criteria remain inspectable without redistributing source video.
media_policy.recovery: Refetch each canonical URL with the case's pinned yt-dlp format selector, then verify the source-media SHA-256 in provenance.json before comparing measurements.

human_truth.reason: C-Q13 adds measured landscape long-form coverage; no independent human annotation was commissioned for this source.

rights.label: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0
rights.limitations: Reuse requires attribution under CC BY 3.0.
